packages.name: OIM Implementation Starter
packages.description: A vendor-maintained starter backlog for an Oracle Identity Manager style implementation, organized by discovery, design, build, deployment, and delivery phases.

epics.title: Discovery and Project Initiation
epics.objective: Align stakeholders, conduct OIM discovery, and define project management cadence.

epics.title: Requirements and Use Case Design
epics.objective: Document, review, refine, and approve OIM requirements, use cases, and business rules.

epics.title: OIM DEV/TEST Build
epics.objective: Configure DEV/TEST identity manager capabilities, connectors, synchronization, and unit tests.

epics.title: Deployment Readiness and UAT
epics.objective: Validate synchronization, system readiness, UAT support, and deployment phase coordination.

epics.title: Production Delivery and Handover
epics.objective: Promote transports, configure production sources, verify readiness, support production, and transfer knowledge.

stories.title: Discovery: Kick-Off
stories.story: As a project team, I want to complete Kick-Off for the Discovery phase so that the implementation can progress with the agreed scope and acceptance evidence.
acceptanceCriteria: Kick-Off is completed within the agreed scope: Kick-off meeting preparation and 1 hour meeting.
Assumptions, decisions, dependencies, and risks are captured in the project record.
Any customer feedback or action items are documented with an owner and target date.
The product owner or customer representative accepts the Discovery phase deliverable.
dod: Deliverable evidence is attached or linked.
Open actions are assigned and visible to the project team.
The story is ready for the next phase handoff.
stories.businessValue: Kick-off meeting preparation and 1 hour meeting.

packages.name: Silver
packages.description: A vendor-maintained Silver starter backlog for IT Shop self-service, requestable items, approvals, dashboards, attestation campaigns, production delivery, and support.

epics.title: Silver Discovery and Project Initiation
epics.objective: Align stakeholders and discover the self-service and attestation package scope.

epics.title: Silver Requirements and Use Case Design
epics.objective: Document and approve Silver package use cases, requirements, and business rules.

epics.title: Silver IT Shop and Attestation Build
epics.objective: Configure IT Shop, catalogs, approvals, requestable items, reporting, dashboards, and attestation campaigns.

epics.title: Silver Deployment Readiness and UAT
epics.objective: Validate readiness, support UAT, and complete deployment phase coordination.

epics.title: Silver Production Delivery and Support
epics.objective: Promote Silver package changes to production, validate readiness, and support production handover.

stories.title: Discovery: Kick-Off
stories.story: As a project team, I want to complete Kick-Off for the Discovery phase so that the implementation can progress with the agreed scope and acceptance evidence.

packages.name: Gold
packages.description: A vendor-maintained Gold starter backlog for IT Shop catalogs, approvals, requestable items, SoD rules, risk rules, additional target connectors, production sync, and knowledge transfer.

epics.title: Gold Discovery and Project Initiation
epics.objective: Align stakeholders and discover applications, IT Shop items, risk rules, and target systems for the Gold package.

epics.title: Gold Requirements and Use Case Design
epics.objective: Document and approve Gold package requirements, use cases, business rules, and acceptance expectations.

epics.title: Gold IT Shop, SoD, Risk, and Connector Build
epics.objective: Configure IT Shop catalogs, approvals, requestable items, SoD rules, risk rules, and additional target connectors.

epics.title: Gold Deployment Readiness and UAT
epics.objective: Validate testing readiness, perform initial sync and data imports, support UAT, and complete deployment coordination.

epics.title: Gold Production Delivery and Knowledge Transfer
epics.objective: Promote transports, verify production readiness, sync target systems, provide support, and complete knowledge transfer.
